query_title: The Lion King II: Simba's Pride

recommendations.title: The Lion King

recommendations.title: The Lion King
recommendations.overview: Simba idolizes his father, King Mufasa, and takes to heart his own royal destiny. But not everyone in the kingdom celebrates the new cub's arrival. Scar, Mufasa's brother—and former heir to the throne—has plans of his own. The battle for Pride Rock i

recommendations.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!: The Dark Side of Dimensions
recommendations.overview: Having faced each other on countless occasions, Yugi and Kaiba again put their pride and experience to the test in a duel that transcends dimensions.

recommendations.title: Trouble with the Curve
recommendations.overview: Slowed by age and failing eyesight, crack baseball scout Gus Lobel takes his grown daughter along as he checks out the final prospect of his career. Along the way, the two renew their bond, and she catches the eye of a young player-turned-scout.

recommendations.title: Quest for Camelot
recommendations.overview: During the times of King Arthur, Kayley is a brave girl who dreams of following her late father as a Knight of the Round Table. The evil Ruber wants to invade Camelot and take the throne of King Arthur, and Kayley has to stop him.

recommendations.title: The Beastmaster
recommendations.overview: Dar, is the son of a king, who's hunted by a priest after his birth and grows up in another family. When he becomes a grown man, his new father is murdered by savages and he discovers that he's the ability to communicate with the animals, which leads

recommendations.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers: Once & Always
recommendations.overview: After tragedy strikes, an unlikely young hero takes her rightful place among the Power Rangers to face off against the team's oldest archnemesis.

recommendations.title: The King and the Mockingbird
recommendations.overview: A young shepherdess and a chimneysweep plan to get married and escape the clutches of a tyrannical king in love with her, assisted by the guile of a cheeky mockingbird, the king's archenemy.

recommendations.title: Us Again
recommendations.overview: In a vibrant city pulsating with rhythm and movement, an elderly man and his young-at-heart wife rekindle their youthful passion for life and each other on one magical night.

recommendations.title: Black Beauty
recommendations.overview: The fates of horses, and the people who own and command them, are revealed as Black Beauty narrates the circle of his life.
